# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Parameters:
  AccountIds:
    Description: 'Comma separated list of account ids to allow access from'
    Type: String
  RoleName:
    Description: 'The name of the role we want to create'
    Type: String
Resources:
  Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - codebuild.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole

      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: 'CI/CD'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: 2012-10-17
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:*
                Resource: "*"
